overview: Premium beauty and bridal salon website for Makeup by Snehal Pawar and Academy in Amravati, Maharashtra. Features a warm brown and beige light theme with 3D animations, comprehensive service showcase, beauty academy section, and online appointment booking.
features: Full identity rebrand to Makeup by Snehal Pawar and Academy
Warm brown and beige light theme throughout
About & Our Story page with timeline
Book Appointment page with WhatsApp integration
Updated address, phone, and location to Amravati Maharashtra
3D animated sections with warm gold/brown accents
Google Maps embed with Amravati coordinates
